title: UIAO Governance Metadata Schema
description: Canonical metadata contract for UIAO governance artifacts (canon/, playbooks/, appendices/). This schema documents the rules enforced by tools/metadata_validator.py. The validator currently hardcodes these rules and does not consume the schema at runtime; this schema is maintained as the single source of truth for the metadata contract so that (a) humans and tooling can read it, and (b) a future validator rewrite can switch to schema-driven validation without re-deriving the contract. Rules that are not purely JSON-Schema-expressible are documented under x-validator-rules.

document_id.description: Canonical UIAO artifact identifier. Format: UIAO_NNN (exactly three digits). Reserved ranges are tracked in the canon registry.

version.description: Semantic major.minor version (e.g., 1.0). Patch component is not used at the metadata layer.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Not to be confused with classification, which captures authority, not lifecycle.

classification.description: Authority tier. CANONICAL = source of truth; DERIVED = generated from canonical source (requires provenance block); OPERATIONAL = runtime/process artifacts.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) or datetime prefix. Validator permits trailing precision/timezone suffixes.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 date or datetime. Must be >= created_at (enforced by the validator via string comparison; see x-validator-rules.updated_at_monotonic).

boundary.description: Compliance boundary. Only GCC-Moderate is permitted unless boundary-exception is true (Amazon Connect Contact Center is the sole documented Commercial Cloud exception under the UIAO canon).

boundary-exception.description: Escape hatch for the boundary enum and the body-text boundary-violation scan. Use sparingly and document the justification in the body.

provenance.description: Required when classification == 'DERIVED'. Ties a derived artifact to its canonical source.

source.description: Path to the canonical source artifact. The validator verifies that this path resolves under the base path or its parent.

x-validator-rules.description: Rules enforced by tools/metadata_validator.py that are not purely JSON-Schema-expressible. Update this block if you modify the validator.
x-validator-rules.updated_at_monotonic: updated_at string comparison >= created_at string comparison; BLOCKING otherwise.
x-validator-rules.provenance_source_resolution: When classification == 'DERIVED', provenance.source must resolve to a path that exists under base_path or base_path.parent.
x-validator-rules.body_boundary_violations: Body text matching /GCC[\s-]?High|DoD|IL[456]|Azure\s+(IaaS|PaaS)|azure\.com/i is BLOCKING unless boundary-exception == true.
x-validator-rules.body_mermaid: Body containing a ```mermaid fenced block raises a WARNING (PlantUML is the preferred diagram format).
x-validator-rules.walker_skip: Files named INDEX.md and README.md are skipped by the directory walker and therefore exempt from metadata rules.
